calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Steven D. Cribb, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Northern California Collection Service, Inc.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant General K. Construction, Co. a California Corporation
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $45,507.72
Pre-Judgment Interest: $6,005.72
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $623.51
Total Judgment in the amount of $52,136.95
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Continued To Apr-05-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
